description: Synthesizes raw cruise data, guest counts, taxes, excursions, and Agent Perks into a finalized, bookable CruisePackage object. Invoke ONLY after odysseus_search has returned at least one itinerary code AND pricing_comparator has confirmed budget fit. Pass all known itinerary options (up to 3) to enable side-by-side comparison mode. Never invoke during onboarding or early discovery.

packages.description: One to three cruise options to build packages for. Pass multiple for comparison mode.

cruiseDetails.odysseusItineraryCode: string — the itinerary code returned by odysseus_search (e.g. CARN-12345)
cruiseDetails.baseFarePerPerson: number — base cabin fare per person in USD
cruiseDetails.taxesAndFeesPerPerson: number — taxes, port fees, NCF per person in USD

items.gratuityPerPerson: number (optional) — prepaid gratuity per person in USD, default 0
items.appliedPerkCodes: string[] (optional) — Agent Perk codes to apply, e.g. ["OBC50", "FREE_GRATS"]
items.depositTier: string (optional) — one of: standard | promo | group. Defaults to standard

output_schema.comparisonMode: boolean — true when 2 or more packages are returned
